steps.sql: SELECT a, sum(b), typeof(sum(b)) FROM t1 GROUP BY a ORDER BY a;
SELECT b, typeof(b) FROM t1 WHERE a=3;

CREATE INDEX t1i1 ON t1(a,b);
    SELECT b, typeof(b) FROM t1 WHERE a=3;

REINDEX;
    SELECT b, typeof(b) FROM t1 WHERE a=3;

CREATE TABLE t3 AS SELECT * FROM t1;
    SELECT b, typeof(b) FROM t3 WHERE a=3;
